description: M8A Strategy Roadmap replay fixture — 15-task plan with mixed serial/parallel structure captured from custody-control-plane strategy documents. Replay must be byte-stable: compile twice and assert identical task_contract_hash, seriality, critical_path, max_width, and unchanged fixture bytes.

tasks.objective: Parse and validate the strategy contract root document.
tasks.description: Read STRATEGY.md from the initiative root and validate it against the megaplan-initiatives-v1 schema.
tasks.complexity_justification: Single-document parsing with schema validation against a stable contract.

tasks.objective: Extract roadmap horizons and their entries.
tasks.description: Parse the strategy roadmap horizons (Now/Next/Later) and extract all ticket, epic, and initiative references.
tasks.complexity_justification: Multi-section parsing with reference extraction requiring correct horizon attribution.

S1.reason: S2 requires the parsed strategy contract to locate roadmap sections.

tasks.objective: Resolve all epic and ticket references to artifacts.
tasks.description: For every strategy roadmap entry, resolve the referenced epic or ticket to its on-disk artifact and verify it exists.
tasks.complexity_justification: Multi-artifact resolution with existence checking across the initiative directory tree.

S2.reason: S3 needs the extracted roadmap entries to know which artifacts to resolve.

tasks.description: Verify every milestone in chain.yaml has a corresponding brief, branch, and profile configuration.
tasks.complexity_justification: Schema validation across multiple chain.yaml sections with cross-reference checking.

tasks.objective: Validate milestone launch preconditions are satisfied.
tasks.description: For each milestone, check that all launch preconditions (git-tracked files, text containment, etc.) are met.
tasks.complexity_justification: Multi-condition validation across file existence, git tracking, and text containment checks.

S4.reason: S5 uses the chain validation results to determine which preconditions need checking.

tasks.objective: Cross-reference roadmap entries with chain milestones.
tasks.description: Ensure every roadmap horizon entry has a corresponding chain.yaml milestone and vice versa for active work.
tasks.complexity_justification: Cross-reference between two structured data sources with mismatch detection.

S3.reason: S6 needs resolved roadmap artifacts to cross-reference with chain milestones.

S5.reason: S6 needs validated preconditions to identify active vs blocked milestones.

tasks.objective: Detect orphaned tickets not in any roadmap horizon.
tasks.description: Identify all tickets in the backlog that are not referenced in any strategy roadmap horizon.
tasks.complexity_justification: Set-difference operation between ticket inventory and roadmap references.

S3.reason: S7 needs resolved artifacts to know which tickets exist vs which are roadmap-referenced.

tasks.objective: Detect stale roadmap entries referencing addressed tickets.
tasks.description: Find roadmap entries that reference tickets already marked as addressed but whose roadmap entry was not removed.
tasks.complexity_justification: Status-check operation comparing roadmap entries against ticket statuses.

S3.reason: S8 needs resolved artifacts to check ticket statuses against roadmap entries.

tasks.objective: Generate strategy projection from parsed strategy and chain.
tasks.description: Produce the disposable strategy.projection.json from the authoritative strategy document and chain.yaml.
tasks.complexity_justification: Projection generation combining two structured inputs with correct horizon ordering.

S6.reason: S9 uses the cross-reference results to generate an accurate projection.

tasks.objective: Validate projection against North Star invariants.
tasks.description: Verify the generated projection does not violate any North Star declarations about authority boundaries or artifact ownership.
tasks.complexity_justification: North Star validation requires checking projection entries against declared authority boundaries.

S9.reason: S10 validates the generated projection for North Star compliance.

tasks.objective: Audit migration matrix for strategy consistency.
tasks.description: Cross-check the migration matrix entries against the strategy roadmap to ensure migration steps align with declared direction.
tasks.complexity_justification: Cross-document consistency check between migration matrix and strategy roadmap.

S6.reason: S11 uses the cross-reference to identify which migration steps correspond to roadmap entries.

tasks.objective: Generate strategic health report with all diagnostics.
tasks.description: Compile all validation results into a single strategic health report with pass/fail/warn status per dimension.
tasks.complexity_justification: Aggregation of existing validation results with status classification.

S7.reason: S12 includes orphaned ticket diagnostics in the health report.

S8.reason: S12 includes stale entry diagnostics in the health report.

S10.reason: S12 includes North Star validation results in the health report.

S11.reason: S12 includes migration audit results in the health report.

tasks.description: Check that every initiative directory follows the required structure (chain.yaml, briefs/, STRATEGY.md, etc.).
tasks.complexity_justification: Directory structure validation with known required artifacts.

tasks.objective: Verify epic promotion records are consistent.
tasks.description: Audit all epic promotion records to ensure ticket-to-epic transitions preserved correct metadata and roadmap entries.
tasks.complexity_justification: Multi-record audit requiring comparison of before/after states for promoted epics.

S13.reason: S14 uses the structure check to locate all epic directories for promotion audit.

tasks.objective: Produce final strategy audit report with all findings.
tasks.description: Aggregate all strategy audit findings into a final report with severity classifications and recommended actions.
tasks.complexity_justification: Multi-source aggregation with severity classification requiring correct prioritization logic.

S12.reason: S15 includes the strategic health report in the final audit.

S14.reason: S15 includes the promotion audit results in the final audit.
